result.stdout:
usage:
  Executes the commands
    envm [command] [command-options]

commands:
    run    Runs the pipeline configured in the lua file

For more information about the commands please run
     envm [command] --help

commands.payload:
usage:
  Executes the commands
    envm [command] [command-options]

commands:
    run    Runs the pipeline configured in the lua file

For more information about the commands please run
     envm [command] --help

result.stdout:
usage:
  Runs the pipeline configured in the lua file
    envm run [run-options] [file]

parameters:
    file      The lua file containing the pipeline

run-options:
    -s        Runs the pipeline without using stages
    -v        Enables the verbose mode for logs
    --test    Setup the test environment

commands.payload:
usage:
  Runs the pipeline configured in the lua file
    envm run [run-options] [file]

parameters:
    file      The lua file containing the pipeline

run-options:
    -s        Runs the pipeline without using stages
    -v        Enables the verbose mode for logs
    --test    Setup the test environment
